examples:
Command Example
!misp-search-attributes category="Other" value="TestMotors"
Context Example
{
"MISP.Attribute": [
{
'ID': '215746',
'EventID': '12041',
name: misp-search-attributes

outputs.description: Attribute distribution. MISP.Attribute.Value Attribute value.
outputs.name: MISP.Attribute.Distribution

outputs.description: Attribute event ID. MISP.Attribute.Timestamp Attribute timestamp.
outputs.name: MISP.Attribute.EventID

outputs.description: Whether the attribute is deleted. MISP.Attribute.DisableCorrelation Whether attribute correlation is disabled.
outputs.name: MISP.Attribute.Deleted

outputs.description: Attribute type. MISP.Attribute.ID Attribute ID.
outputs.name: MISP.Attribute.Type

outputs.description: Attribute UUID. MISP.Attribute.ShadowAttribute Attribute shadow attribute.
outputs.name: MISP.Attribute.UUID

outputs.description: Whether the Intrusion Detection System flag is set. MISP.Attribute.Category Attribute category.
outputs.name: MISP.Attribute.ToIDs

outputs.description: Attribute sharing group ID. MISP.Attribute.Comment Attribute comment.
outputs.name: MISP.Attribute.SharingGroupID

outputs.description: MISP event ID. MISP.Attribute.Event.Distribution MISP event distribution.
outputs.name: MISP.Attribute.Event.ID

outputs.description: Threat level of the MISP event (1 High, 2 Medium, 3 Low, 4 Undefined). MISP.Attribute.Event.PublishTimestamp Timestamp of the publish time (if published).
outputs.name: MISP.Attribute.Event.ThreatLevelID

outputs.description: Email address of the event creator. MISP.Attribute.Event.Date date
outputs.name: MISP.Attribute.Event.EventCreatorEmail

outputs.description: MISP.Attribute.Event.Locked Is the event locked. MISP.Attribute.Event.OwnerOrganisation.ID
outputs.name: Event creation date.

outputs.description: Owner organization ID. MISP.Attribute.Event.OwnerOrganisation.Name Owner organization name.
outputs.name: number

outputs.description: Owner organization UUID. MISP.Attribute.Event.RelatedEvent.ID Event IDs of related events (can be a list).
outputs.name: MISP.Attribute.Event.OwnerOrganisation.UUID

outputs.description: If email lock was proposed. MISP.Attribute.Event.Timestamp Timestamp of the event.
outputs.name: MISP.Attribute.Event.ProposalEmailLock

outputs.description: Event's galaxy description. MISP.Attribute.Event.Galaxy.Name Galaxy name.
outputs.name: MISP.Attribute.Event.Galaxy.Description

outputs.description: Galaxy type. MISP.Attribute.Event.Published Whether the event is published.
outputs.name: MISP.Attribute.Event.Galaxy.Type

outputs.description: Whether correlation is disabled. MISP.Attribute.Event.UUID Event UUID.
outputs.name: MISP.Attribute.Event.DisableCorrelation

outputs.description: Event shadow attributes. MISP.Attribute.Event.Analysis Event analysis (0 Initial, 1 Ongoing, 2 Completed).
outputs.name: MISP.Attribute.Event.ShadowAttribute

outputs.description: Event sharing group ID. MISP.Attribute.Event.Tag.Name All tag names in the event.
outputs.name: MISP.Attribute.Event.SharingGroupID

outputs.description: Object meta category. MISP.Attribute.Object.Distribution Distribution of object.
outputs.name: MISP.Attribute.Object.MetaCategory

outputs.description: Name of the object. MISP.Attribute.Object.TemplateVersion Template version of the object.
outputs.name: MISP.Attribute.Object.Name

outputs.description: ID of the event which the object first created. MISP.Attribute.Object.TemplateUUID UUID of the template.
outputs.name: MISP.Attribute.Object.EventID

outputs.description: Timestamp of object creation. MISP.Attribute.Object.Deleted Whether the object was deleted.
outputs.name: MISP.Attribute.Object.Timestamp

outputs.description: ID of object. MISP.Attribute.Object.UUID UUID of the object.
outputs.name: MISP.Attribute.Object.ID

outputs.description: Description of the object. MISP.Attribute.Galaxy.Description Event's galaxy description.
outputs.name: MISP.Attribute.Object.Description

outputs.description: Galaxy name. MISP.Attribute.Galaxy.Type Galaxy type.
outputs.name: MISP.Attribute.Galaxy.Name

outputs.description: All tag names in the event.
outputs.name: MISP.Attribute.Tag.Name
